question_text: Use the field-line diagram shown below for a current-carrying straight conductor seen from above. The direction of the magnetic field lines tells you the current is flowing:

answer_key.explanation: Using the right-hand thumb rule, anticlockwise field lines around the wire correspond to a current directed out of the page.

visual.caption: Field lines around a wire.
visual.altText: Concentric circular field lines drawn around a single point representing a straight current-carrying conductor seen end-on.
